category_sources: source_facts.description says jsvc launches Java applications as daemons; Apache Commons Daemon documentation describes jsvc for UNIX daemon/service operation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.executables identify jsvc; Apache documentation page is titled Java Service for jsvc.
docs_sources: Official Apache Commons Daemon jsvc and project pages are the primary documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: Official Apache Commons Daemon SCM page gives the anonymous Git clone URL as https://gitbox.apache.org/repos/asf/commons-daemon.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Apache jsvc documentation identify Java daemon/service wrapper behavior.
